productDisplayName: Spinn Men Swift Black Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Swift shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe with an upraised heel and lace-up fasteningWell padded innerFoamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with multidirectional lugs Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the forefoot to act as a toe guardMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
